title: Smoky Crumbly Hail Crumble
description: A nut-free-friendly smoky brunch-mood dish featuring a blend of hail, crispy bits, and savory flavor for a satisfying breakfast option.

ingredients.name: Hail
ingredients.notes: Use fresh or thawed frozen hail if using frozen

ingredients.name: Sugar
ingredients.notes: Brown sugar for added sweetness and smokiness

ingredients.name: Baking Powder
ingredients.notes: To aid in the crumbly texture

instructions: Mix hail and flour together until well combined.
Add sugar, bacon bits if using, nuts, salt, and baking powder to the mixture. Mix thoroughly until all ingredients are evenly distributed.
Press the dough into a greased or parchment-lined dish.
Bake for 15 minutes or until golden brown and crispy on top.
